author: y4rr
content: Implementing closed-form TransformedDistribution::entropy: add constant_entropy_contribution() trait hook (AffineTransform returns Some(log|scale|), ComposeTransform sums children), add is_exp_transform() hook for ExpTransform special case, and rewrite TransformedDistribution::entropy() to dispatch on empty / all-constant / single-Exp / precise-error paths. Add discriminating fixture transformed_normal_affine to pin script + verify harness + Rust dump for parity with torch's analytic equivalent Normal(2,3).entropy().
